question: mera refund kab tak aayega, maine order cancel kiya tha
ground_truth: Refund 5-7 business days mein aapke original payment method par aa jata hai.

question: order ko track karne ka tarika batao
ground_truth: Order track karne ke liye Orders page par jaayein aur Track par tap karein.

question: why is my coupon not applying to the cart
ground_truth: Ek order par ek hi coupon apply hota hai aur minimum cart value zaroori hai.

question: return panna epdi, delivery aagiduchu
ground_truth: Aam, delivery ana 7 naatkalukkul Orders page-la irundhu return request panna mudiyum.

question: order cancel karna hai, kaise karu
ground_truth: You can cancel your order from the Orders page before it ships.
